steps.title: Match the two formulas
steps.content:
The general formula is:
$$
K=\frac{1}{2}mv^2
$$
For this object, the formula is:
$$
K=36v^2
$$
So the coefficients of $v^2$ must match.

steps.title: Solve for the mass
steps.content: Set the coefficients equal: $$ \frac{1}{2}m=36 $$ $$ m=72 $$ The answer is B.
